sections.heading: 1. Overview
sections.content: Digital FM (Frequency Modulation) sound source with 6 channels, 4 operators per channel. Features SSG-EG, DAC control, and LFO.

sections.heading: 3. Operator Structure
sections.content: 4 operators (OP1-OP4) with per-operator TL, MULTI, AR, DR, SR, RR, SL, etc.
